trigger.description: A context pack selects memories with directly contradictory claims on the same subject.
setup_commands: ee remember 'Always use HTTPS for callbacks.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --tag transport-https --json
ee remember 'Never use HTTPS for callbacks.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --tag transport-https --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Review the conflicting memory IDs before acting on either claim.
